data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for debugging artifacts during identity conflicts or merge ambiguities.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the ability to debug artifacts when identity conflicts or merge ambiguities occur. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this functionality. The linked use case outlines the need for debugging artifacts but lacks specific evidence of its implementation or success, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of debugging artifacts when identity conflicts or merge ambiguities occur.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the debugging artifacts requirement.
